title: v3errorEndFatal marked noreturn but GCC thinks it returns
body:
---


Author Name: **Mike Popoloski**
Original Redmine Issue: 1209 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

GCC is unhappy with the recently added v3errorEndFatal changes, which mark the function as __attribute__ ((noreturn)). I fixed them up by adding __builtin_unreachable(); after the assert(0) in each case, but a more robust solution is probably required for compilers that don't support __builtin_unreachable (MSVC?)
